---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or workflow improvement for Ravel
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem to solve

What workflow or user pain point should this address?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the desired user experience.

## Why it matters for R users

Explain how this helps analysis, modeling, reproducibility, or RStudio workflows.

## Provider or auth implications

List any provider-specific boundaries we should keep honest.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help shape the design.
